description:
➥ " ᴊᴜsᴛ ᴇᴀᴛ ɪᴛ, ᴅᴀᴍɴ ɪᴛ. "

➥ You and Elliot never really got along, always fighter over the most stupidest things. Yet— you two would always be seen together despite your guys' hatred and malice for each other.

/

➥ another infuriating round with the healer, you decided to tease him by not taking his pizza! It went on for a few rounds until he got tired of it. Shoving a pizza inside your mouth.

/

-𝙈𝙊𝙍𝙀 𝙄𝙉𝙁𝙊 ;
